steps.title: Read the praise
steps.content: The critics call one film galvanizing and the other exuberant. Both descriptions are enthusiastic and positive, so the blank must name public praise.

steps.title: Rule out mismatches
steps.content: Choice A means neutrality, not praise. Choice B means mixed feelings, but the descriptions are positive. Choice C means ability to predict the future, which does not fit critical reception. The answer is D.
